Sage Bot Item Code: A138


Other locations the gear can be found
Royal Quest
Love Potion Artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Beauty of the Night
Creates a star shower. The star shower continues for 7 sec. Every 1 sec, stars fall on 3 random units:
- If star falls on an ally, it casts a shield that absorbs damage of any type. The shield absorbs damage equal to 150000 and lasts for up to 3 sec. Also, the unit's damage is increased by 25% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. When the shield wears off, the unit takes 25% less damage of any type for 3 sec.
- If the star fall on an enemy, it sets the target on fire. The burning enemy takes 144000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec. If the star falls on an enemy, it starts incinerating the target for 3 sec. The incinerated enemy takes 100000 pure damage every second for 3 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated unit take pure damage equal to 50% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor are reduced by 25% for 3 sec. After being hit by a star, burning or incinerated enemies take 30% more damage of any type and deal 15% less damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
